feeds.title: Lateral with Tom Scott
feeds.description:
Award-winning comedy panel game about weird questions with wonderful answers. Each week, Tom Scott is joined by three guests to ask each other questions with a sideways twist. There's no points or prizes - just reputation and bragging rights on the line. Enquiries and question submissions: https://www.lateralcast.com.
Ad-free shows and bonus content: https://www.lateralcast.com/club.

feeds.title: Escape This Podcast
feeds.description: A show that's a mix of escape room puzzles and tabletop role-playing.

feeds.title: Solve This Murder
feeds.description: Play along with Bill as he collects clues and interviews suspects to solve original whodunit murder mysteries!
